def positive_same_feature_path_crosses_many_layers_for_simple_data_transform():
    rule_id = "same_feature_path_crosses_many_layers_for_simple_data_transform"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag simple transformations that bounce through too many layers or wrappers."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
